codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly maps 'Kode Akun GL' Excel column to coa_kode, resolves coa_id via coa.kode lookup, and handles unmatched COA gracefully with coa_id=null. Backend importAspekKerjaBatch already had the resolution logic in place.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature relies on ExcelImportModal's optionalFields prop, which was a new addition. The backend importAspekKerjaBatch already handled coa_kode->coa_id resolution before this feature was implemented - this is correctly documented in the handoff.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: coaDatabase.ts already had coaIdMap resolution logic. The frontend worker correctly identified and leveraged existing backend capability.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Frontend worker skill (SKILL.md) mentions Excel column mapping for Aspek Kerja as 'Kode Akun GL -> coa_kode (resolve to coa_id)' which aligns with the implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md - Excel Import section shows correct mapping for AK sheet

sharedStateObservations.observation: No additional services or commands were used beyond the standard npm run typecheck, lint, and build:renderer commands listed in services.yaml
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification shows only standard commands were run

summary: Feature implementation passes review. COA linkage is correctly implemented: (1) ASPEK_KERJA_FIELD_LABELS now maps 'Kode Akun GL' to coa_kode, (2) coa_kode is marked as optional so empty values don't fail validation, (3) ExcelImportModal was extended to support optionalFields, (4) backend importAspekKerjaBatch correctly resolves coa_kode to coa_id via matching to coa.kode, setting null when not found. No blocking issues or bugs found.
